title: 10 best herbal creams for prostate inflammation
description: Slippery elm creams helps with prostate inflammation because of its anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm irritated tissues in the prostate gland. The mucilage extracted from the inner bark of the slippery elm tree forms a protective barrier, reducing swelling and discomfort associated with prostatitis. Additionally, slippery elm's natural demulcent properties help to reduce irritation and discomfort caused by inflammation, promoting overall prostate health and well-being....
